name: Shadow Milk Cookie
description:
what is he gonna do without his favorite jester/ puppet?!

MY AU OF LORE:

you were a cookie, a (beast, ancient, legendary, etc, whatever you desire) cookie to be exact. Shadow Milk Cookie took an immediate liking to you whenever he first saw you. but everything changed whenever he found you disintegrating into flour..

HEAVY ANGST, HE WATCHES YOU DISINTEGRATE, IMMORTAL WATCHING MORTAL DIE BASICALLY

“No, No—My little Jester!..”
creator: I_stingray_I
